entities.name: malaparos
entities.raw_quote: n. malaparos. malapatas. helatay. helahenay. methay. meray.

entities.name: Maloht
entities.raw_quote: Maloht. Otheos. hatamagiel. hataha. marihel. gezozay. iezoray. gezozay. saziel. sazamay. iezoramp. zazamanp. sacamap. zachamay. iecornamas.

entities.name: Prayer 26

attributes.purpose: To achieve the vision of God and help disbelief

entities.raw_quote: Pie Deus, misericors Deus, clemens Deus omnipotens omnia dans, fac michi credenti hodie omnia possibilia...

entities.name: Prayer 27

attributes.purpose: To honor the Trinity and seek vision through sacraments

entities.raw_quote: Sechce, pie Pater, misericors Fili, clemens Spiritus sancte, Deus, rex ineffabilis et inestimabilis...

entities.name: Prayer 28

attributes.purpose: To wash away sins and prepare for the holy vision

entities.raw_quote: Elscha, profiteor tibi hodie, Deus, Pater omnium, qui secreta celestia ostendisti.

entities.name: Prayer 29

attributes.purpose: To dispose the will according to God's counsel and overcome weakness

entities.raw_quote: Abbadya, omnium regnorum sive potestatum visibilium sive invisibilium dispensator atque dispositor...

entities.name: Prayer 30

attributes.purpose: To receive heavenly grace and the sevenfold gifts of the Holy Spirit

entities.raw_quote: Alpha et Ω, Deus, vivorum dominator et omnium visibilium et invisibilium administrator...

entities.name: Prayer 31
entities.raw_quote: Leyste, profiteor tibi hodie, Deus, Pater omnium, qui secreta celestia ostendisti.

entities.name: Prayer 32
entities.raw_quote: Horistion, Domine, quia ego servus tuus sum...

entities.name: Prayer 33
entities.raw_quote: Jeremon, clementissime Domine, Deus meus, et miserere mei et parce malis meis.

entities.name: Holy Spirit
entities.raw_quote: send the Comforter, the Holy Spirit, from Heaven to me on the Earth

entities.name: Satan

actions: stole ability of seeing and intellect

entities.raw_quote: which ability of seeing and comprehending the judgment of Satan has stolen away.

summary: This chunk contains a series of liturgical prayers (Prayers 26 through 34) intended for the practitioner to achieve a divine vision. It includes various lists of sacred names and sacraments used to purify the soul and strengthen the mind for spiritual encounter.
key_passages: make all things possible today, to me, a believer, and help my very disbelief today
that I may receive inwardly that which you will give and retain and be suited for having the vision of your person
I am a poor sinner presuming to undertake this ceremony, for seeing and recognizing this vision
through your most holy names and sacraments, which are: Hosel. Iesel. Hazaiacol. Iosel. Authiachar...
that the sevenfold gifts of grace of your Holy Spirit may work in me
